name: doc-set-missing-many
anchor: Doc set axis: missing-many (intake email + 1 doc)
rationale: Broker sends minimal intake — email + loan_application only. No mortgage_statement, no appraisal, no NOA, no income docs. Vienna's intake_asked_items flow should detect multiple missing required docs + send comprehensive ask-list to broker. Tests escalation when most-of-package is missing.
notes: Single-event sequence. Distinct from E18 (missing-1) by quantity — tests batch-ask vs single-ask escalation shape.
